economic_notes: Odawa Stone LP (quarry operations, income $134,301 in 2021), Odawa Freshwater LP (25% interest in Odawa Island Farm LP), UCCM Building Material Supply LP (14.28% interest, lumber/building materials), M'Nidoo M'Nising Power LP (16.665% interest, electrical power generation), Great Lakes Hospitality Group LP (11.75% interest, accommodation/restaurant/catering). COVID-19 noted as a risk factor.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Four GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Odawa Stone LP/GP and Odawa Freshwater LP/GP. Three non-controlled partnership interests also on modified equity: UCCM Building Material Supply LP, M'Nidoo M'Nising Power LP, Great Lakes Hospitality Group LP. Total government transfers calculated as Federal ($3,099,084) + Provincial ($1,536,416) = $4,635,500; Kinoomaadziwin Education Body ($1,407,555) treated as OSR as it is an education body transfer but could be considered government transfer — if included, total govt transfers = $6,043,055 and OSR = $2,156,349. ISC per confirmation was $2,254,899 but recognized revenue was $2,181,146 after deferred revenue adjustments. Large TCA acquisition of $3,514,430 in the year drove net debt position. No schedule of remuneration provided. Segmented salaries total extracted from Note 15 segmented schedule ($2,405,576 for 2021). Accounts receivable and current liabilities not separately disclosed in the provided text.
